title: 6 Christmas Candy Cane Sweets - Peppermint Hard Boiled Sweet - Individually Wrapped Tree Candy - Stripy Christmas Tree Decorations - 6 x10g Canes
features: Pack of 6 Christmas Candy Cane Sweets 11cm (Colour Sent at Random).

FESTIVE TREATS - Celebrate the sweetest season of all with this delightful pack of 6 classic Christmas candy canes! Whether you are decking the halls, stuffing stockings, or simply treating yourself to a nostalgic nibble, these colourful canes capture the magic of Christmas in every swirl.

COLOURFUL CANDY - Each candy cane measures 11cm in length and weighs 10g, giving you the perfect balance of festive flavour and decorative flair. These traditional peppermint-style sweets are beautifully striped in either red and white or red, white, and green, colours sent at random for an extra element of holiday surprise! Colour may vary from image shown.

INDIVIDUALLY WRAPPED - Every cane is sealed in its own clear wrapper to maintain freshness and hygiene, making them perfect for sharing at parties, in classrooms, or at the office. Hang them on your Christmas tree, add to wreaths, or include in hampers and stockings for a festive finishing touch.
